description.value:
Your internal chemical balance is adaptable, allowing you to control the composition of your normally flaming expulsions. When you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestry-features.Item.Fire Breath], you can choose to deal acid or cold damage instead of fire damage.

Special If you're a mystic with the elemental connection, you can also choose bludgeoning, electricity, or poison damage instead of fire damage.
